Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So today's theme is the "Hidden Fist: Martial Arts" series...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 6 25 25}{f 4 21 4 10}Somehow I get the feeling we're gonna see a lot of clichés in here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Red Three... This can't be! You should have already reached your limit! How are you still standing...!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Limits exist to be broken. Now, witness my ultimate technique! Goenji Rekka Shinken: Final Form...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ohh! Such an impressive ability... But it is I who shall prevail! Hrraaaaah![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I cheered for the main character,[n]who pulled himself up every[n]time he was knocked down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Did you see that move? His hands were on fire...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}And the way he jumped so high... It looked like he was suspended from the ceiling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I guess that's why they call it "wire fu," huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But from what I saw, I didn't really spot any specialized training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}They won't give up their secrets that easily. Must be why it's called the "Hidden Fist."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}All right, I'm gonna do squats on the monorail the whole way back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I went back to the dorm with Sanada.[n]{f 1 1}
